title: Alice Koeninger Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Alice Koeninger Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Alice Koeninger
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’24
Career Changer
Writer and Align student Alice Koeninger is seeking a balanced career — one where she can exercise her creative and technical skills in equal measure. Her time at Khoury College has shown her that this path is more than achievable, especially in a communication-heavy field like cybersecurity.
There are plenty of opportunities to be creative in scientific fields like computer science and cybersecurity … I found that my background in writing has been a strength for me
Alice Koeninger, Align MSCS ’24
Explore all Khoury Stories
